subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the exalted Realm on high! Turn thou unto the Kingdom of holiness... The signs of the horizons are manifest and evident realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف مطاف عالم بالا توجه بملکوت تقدیس فرما ... ایات افاق حقائق عینیه است
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition
